theme.hero_task: Check for first radish and pea sprouts

tasks.action: Water all beds -- check soil moisture with finger test

prompt.en: Push your finger into the soil -- if it feels dry, give it water!
prompt.da: Tryk din finger ned i jorden -- hvis den foeles toer, giv den vand!

tasks.action: Check Bed A for radish sprouts (sown W16)

prompt.en: Look very closely at the soil -- can you see tiny green dots pushing up?
prompt.da: Kig meget taet paa jorden -- kan du se smaa groenne prikker, der skyder op?

tasks.action: Sow borage seeds in Bed C and Bed E

prompt.en: Sprinkle the big seeds in the holes -- these will grow star-shaped blue flowers!
prompt.da: Drys de store froe i hullerne -- de bliver til stjerneformede blaa blomster!

tasks.action: Sow calendula seeds in Bed A and Bed C

prompt.en: These curly seeds will grow orange flowers that the bees love!
prompt.da: De her krulle-froe bliver til orange blomster, som bierne elsker!

tasks.action: Check pea seeds in Bed C for germination

prompt.en: The pea seeds are waking up! Look for fat green shoots near the trellis.
prompt.da: Aertefroeene vaagner! Kig efter tykke groenne skud ved espalieren.

growth_events.event: First radish seedlings emerging 3-5 days after sowing

prompt.en: The radishes are the fastest -- they pop up in just a few days! Can you count them?
prompt.da: Radiserne er de hurtigste -- de dukker op paa bare faa dage! Kan du taelle dem?

growth_events.event: Strawberry plants establishing with new leaf growth

prompt.en: Look at the strawberry plants -- see the bright green new leaves in the center?
prompt.da: Kig paa jordbaerplanterne -- ser du de lyse groenne nye blade i midten?
